Operation 'getBusiness' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what business information is retrieved. Description is completely empty, providing no context about purpose, inputs, outputs, or authentication requirements. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves the authenticated user's business account, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates the response format for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the business account information for the authenticated user. Returns business details including account settings, configuration, and metadata. This operation requires bearer token authentication and returns a single business object representing the current business account.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't indicate what business information is retrieved. Description is completely empty, providing no context about purpose, inputs, outputs, or authentication requirements. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves the authenticated user's business account, specifies authentication requirement, and indicates the response format for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getMessageTemplates' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity about what templates are for and their use case. Description is empty, missing critical information about purpose, return format, and authentication. Improved version clarifies that templates are used for campaigns/broadcasts, specifies the return type (list), and includes authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available message templates for campaigns
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all available message templates configured for the authenticated business account. Message templates are pre-defined message formats used in broadcasts and messaging campaigns. Returns a list of template objects containing template metadata, content, and configuration. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what templates are for and their use case. Description is empty, missing critical information about purpose, return format, and authentication. Improved version clarifies that templates are used for campaigns/broadcasts, specifies the return type (list), and includes authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.
